subcodes.first_line: God willing, through the bounty of the True One, exalted be His glory, mayest thou be successful and act in accordance with that which He hath commanded. Today the enemies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت حق جل جلاله فائز باشی و بانچه امر فرموده عامل امروز اعدا بر
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
